infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeCircle uses your location to show your position to volunteers during an SOS emergency.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeCircle needs background location to stream your GPS coordinates to first responders during an active SOS, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeCircle needs background location so emergency responders can track your position in real-time.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SafeCircle listens for the Voice SOS hotword (e.g. 'help me safecircle') so it can alert volunteers hands-free.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: SafeCircle uses on-device speech recognition to detect your SOS hotword without sending audio to any server.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeCircle can silently capture an evidence photo during an SOS event to assist responders and law enforcement.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SafeCircle needs background location to stream your GPS to first responders during an active SOS.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow SafeCircle to access location in the background during SOS.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SafeCircle uses location to pinpoint you during emergencies.

plugins.cameraPermission: SafeCircle captures evidence photos during SOS events.
